title: salix × negata
intro: Salix × nigra, also known as black willow, is a hybrid plant species derived from the cross between Salix nigra and Salix alba. The bark of the Salix × nigra plant contains salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, which makes it a valuable source for medicinal properties. The health benefits associated with Salix × nigra include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as having antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Salix × nigra is commonly prepared as a salve, tincture, or tea, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in herbal remedies for various health conditions.
